title: Qwen3-4B-GGUF Model Card
citation: Qwen. Qwen3-4B-GGUF model card and Hugging Face model metadata. Accessed 2026-05-03; model API spot-check for license and revision repeated 2026-05-06.
permitted_uses: Planning source for a small local reasoning smoke-test model candidate using llama.cpp/GGUF on Apple Silicon.
claims_supported: Qwen provides official GGUF model repositories for Qwen3 models.
The Qwen3-4B-GGUF card includes llama.cpp-oriented usage guidance.
As spot-checked on 2026-05-06, Hugging Face model metadata reports license apache-2.0 and main revision bc640142c66e1fdd12af0bd68f40445458f3869b.
claims_not_supported: That Qwen3-4B-GGUF is sufficient for final actor dialogue quality.
That the model has been downloaded or benchmarked locally.
